name: Cursor
description: Cursor is a code editor built on VS Code with deep AI integration. Designers who code use it to build and iterate on UI fast — just describe what you want and it writes the code. Known for its tab autocomplete and multi-file AI edits.

name: Claude
description: Claude is Anthropic's AI assistant used by designers for writing UX copy, generating design briefs, structuring research, and thinking through product decisions. Known for nuanced, thoughtful responses and handling long documents.

name: Framer
description: Framer is a design tool that lets you build fully interactive, production-ready websites without writing code. AI features help generate layouts and copy on the fly. The go-to for designers who want to ship without a developer.

name: Lovable
description: Lovable lets you build full-stack web apps by describing what you want in plain English. Popular with product designers who want to go from idea to working prototype without touching code. Pairs well with Figma designs.

name: Jitter
description: Jitter is a motion design tool built for UI teams. Create smooth UI animations, loading states, and micro-interactions without After Effects. AI helps generate animation presets. Perfect for designers who want to add life to their product.

name: Figma
description: Figma is the industry-standard UI design tool. Its AI features now include auto-layout suggestions, design linting, and the ability to generate UI from text prompts. The hub of nearly every design workflow.

name: Midjourney
description: Midjourney generates high-quality images from text prompts. Designers use it for moodboards, concept exploration, marketing visuals, and hero imagery. Known for its aesthetic quality and style consistency.

name: v0 by Vercel
description: v0 is Vercel's AI tool for generating React/Tailwind UI components from text descriptions or screenshots. Designers use it to quickly scaffold UI they can hand off or continue building. Outputs clean, copy-pasteable code.

name: Runway
description: Runway is an AI-powered video creation and editing platform. UX designers and brand teams use it to generate product videos, animate still images, and create motion assets without a video team.

name: Perplexity
description: Perplexity is an AI search engine that gives cited, up-to-date answers. Designers use it for quick research, competitive analysis, trend discovery, and understanding unfamiliar topics — without sifting through search results.

name: Galileo AI
description: Galileo AI generates polished UI designs directly from text descriptions. It outputs editable Figma-compatible designs. Useful for quickly exploring design directions before committing to detailed work.

name: Claude Code
description: Claude Code is Anthropic's CLI coding agent that works directly in your terminal or editor. It reads your codebase, plans changes, and executes them. Designers who code use it to build features and fix bugs through conversation.
